creator: chinsan.tw@gmail.com
text:
Hi, portmgr@:

On Nov 8, 2007 12:29 AM, chinsan <chinsan.tw@gmail.com> wrote:
> On Nov 7, 2007 6:23 PM, Daniel Gerzo <danger@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Hello guys,
> >
> >   I would like to ask to commit this ASAP, as the previous version does
> >   not compile for me on 7.0, with this patch, it worsk flawlessly.
> >
>
> Dear re@ team:
>
> Could you please take a look at this PR?
> This PR also unbreak pecl-memcache-2.2.0 on FreeBSD 7.0.
>
> Thanks.

Sorry, I forgot this request should send to portmgr@ instead of re@. :p
